heading: Tracking of benefits
label: 8785 Tracking of benefits
text: As soon as practicable after the date of enactment of this Act, the Secretary may track the benefits provided, directly or indirectly, to individuals and entities under titles I and II and the amendments made by those titles.
notes: References in TextThe date of enactment of this Act, referred to in text, is the date of enactment of , which was approved .Pub.
